title: MYKAGS Prosecco Sparkling Wine Glasses, Crystal Champagne Flutes, Set of 6 165ml Elegant Party Champagne Glasses, Ideal for Celebrations and Special Occasions, Premium Quality Crystal Glassware
features: Elegant Design for Wine Enthusiasts: Immerse yourself in the world of refined taste with our meticulously crafted 6-piece champagne flute set, designed specifically for those who appreciate the rich aromas of champagne. The delicate ribbed patterns on each glass elevate your experience, allowing you to savor the enchanting fruit notes of top-tier beverages with every sip.

Exquisite Champagne Experience: Our classic tall flute design not only adds a touch of sophistication to celebrations—be it weddings, birthdays, or restaurant parties—but also ensures that the effervescence and fragrances of your champagne are fully released. Enjoy the delightful dance of bubbles as they rise to the surface, enhancing every moment of your special occasion.

Premium Quality Lead-Free Glass: Crafted from exquisite crystal glass renowned for its clarity and exceptional craftsmanship, our champagne flutes redefine your drinking experience. Elevate your gatherings and feel like a professional sommelier with each pour, as the high-quality materials enhance both the look and feel of your favorite bubbly.

Perfect Gift for Celebrations: This exquisite 6-piece champagne flute set is perfect for those seeking elegance during special moments. Whether for personal use or as a thoughtful gift, our charming flutes are the quintessential addition to any celebration, making them the ideal choice for friends and loved ones alike.

Ideal Dimensions for Enjoyment: Standing at a height of 19.5 cm with a rim diameter of 6 cm and a generous capacity of 165 ml, these flutes are designed to meet all your champagne needs. Enjoy the perfect pour every time, ensuring your celebrations are nothing short of extraordinary.
description: Product Description Elevate your celebration with our exquisite set of six classic champagne flutes, meticulously designed for wine enthusiasts who appreciate the finer things in life. Each glass holds 165ml of sparkling wine, expertly crafted to enhance the rich and elegant aromas of your favorite champagne. Our stylish and slender champagne glass design is the perfect addition to weddings, birthday parties, restaurant gatherings, and any occasion that values sophistication. The elongated shape enriches the bubbles and aromas, ensuring that every sip is a delightful experience. Set Includes: 6 champagne glasses Dimensions: Height 19.5 cm, Rim Diameter 6 cm, Capacity 165ml
